notes: Audio Issues as descriped in other reviews but textures can be fixed just like in windows (http://www.tm-forum.com/viewtopic.php?p=196489#p196489)
title: Trackmania United Forever Star Edition

notes: Needed to use " protontricks 7200 d3dx9 " and " protontricks 7200 videomemorysize=2048 " for the textures to render properly. Even then, had to lower the Texture Quality to Medium to stop the game from freezing or crashing when I finished a track.
title: Trackmania United Forever Star Edition

notes: Textures are low-quality (and cannot be set to an higher setting) due to the game wrongly reporting the available video RAM on recent GPUs. This can be fixed by installing a patch.
title: Trackmania United Forever Star Edition

notes: Starts with 2 errors while trying to star the performance check you can just ignore. Texture bug is the same as in Windows and can either be patched or get rid of with protontweaks. Only problem still is the sound, you don't have engine or menu sounds. Music and environmental sounds are playing though, so it's still playable imho.
title: Trackmania United Forever Star Edition

notes: There are a few errors on startup and low resolution textures. The game itself runs pretty well, but is missing some audio.
title: Trackmania United Forever Star Edition
